name: Russian Quest
short_description: Immerse yourself in a fascinating journey through Russian culture with a game that will test your knowledge and erudition! In this game you will become a participant of a unique test covering the rich cultural heritage of Russia of different epochs - from ancient traditions to modern customs.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a fascinating journey through Russian culture with a game that will test your knowledge and erudition! In this game you will become a participant of a unique test covering the rich cultural heritage of Russia of different epochs - from ancient traditions to modern customs.

For each correct answer you get 1 point, but be careful: for a mistake you will also get 1 point. The game requires concentration and deep knowledge, because only the most worthy will be able to earn the highest title of connoisseur of Russian culture.

After passing the test you will be given a special title that will reflect your level of skill. Will you become a “Courtier”, “Hundreder”, “Prince” or perhaps a “Voivode”? It all depends on your knowledge and determination!

Ready to take on the challenge and demonstrate your love for Russian culture? Then start the game right now!

For maximum convenience you can expand the game into full screen mode by pressing F , and to return to windowed mode - just press W .
about_the_game:

After passing the test you will be given a special title that will reflect your level of skill. Will you become a “Courtier”, “Hundreder”, “Prince” or perhaps a “Voivode”? It all depends on your knowledge and determination!

Ready to take on the challenge and demonstrate your love for Russian culture? Then start the game right now!
